Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Enforcing Court Approved Minors Compromise Settlement And Compelling Immediate Payment Of Attorney Fees And Costs Pursuant To Probate Code 3601 And Ccp 664.6; Points And Authorities;
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Off Calendar

Petition To Compromise Disputed Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar, as assigned by the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206, for a hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 504: Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk L. Fong, matter not reported.

Appearances on TUE-AUG-16-2016:
Craig A. Kroner, Esq. (T: 408.433.9301), appearing for and with Petitioner/Guardian Ad Litem: Luz Veronica Mendoza-Espinoza, and for Minor Emmanuel Alegria Mendoza, who is also present.
Spanish interpreter Hugo Moreno is present to assist Ms. Mendoza-Espinoza.
No appearances other appearances.

Through the Spanish interpreter, Petitioner/Guardian Ad Litem Ms. Mendoza-Espinoza acknowledges she understands and accepts the terms of the minor's compromise settlement. After discussions and review of the petition, the Court GRANTS the Petition and the compropmise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $150,00.00
Attorney's Fees: $40,856.00
Other related case fees and expenses: $33,179.00
Settlement, after deductions: $75,965.00 less final Medi-Cal lien or waiver will be used to purchase annuity for benefit of Minor Emmanuel Alegria Mendoza.

Status Hearing Date is set on November 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 504 for filing of a receipt for deposit of money into an annuity.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 504 prior to the status hearing date. Order signed in open court.
